data.title: Add SC Coverage Haiku Gate sub-step to sprint SKILL.md Preplanning Gate
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Insert the haiku-tier SC coverage gate as sub-step 2a1 (or equivalent numbered sub-step after Step 2a) in sprint SKILL.md's Preplanning Gate section. The gate is inline prose instructions following the established haiku dispatch pattern (Clarity Gate Layer 2, Step 2b).

**Implementation details**:
- Add new sub-step after Step 2a (Existing Children Readiness Check) in the Preplanning Gate
- Use a sub-step number that does NOT shift existing step numbers (e.g., "Step 2a1" or "Step 2b" inserted between 2a and existing 2b)
- The sub-step dispatches a haiku sub-agent (subagent_type: general-purpose, model: haiku) with the epic's SC list and children descriptions, using the prompt at `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/sc-coverage-haiku.md`
- Parse haiku JSON output: if all SCs are cited-covered → proceed to Phase 3
- Parse failure → log warning, skip gate, proceed to Phase 3 (fail-open)
- 0-SC epic → log warning, skip gate trivially, proceed to Phase 3
- ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME idempotency: if resume context indicates gate already completed, skip

**Scope**: Only the haiku tier — sonnet/opus escalation is out of scope (story 536e-3683).

**Dependency**: This step references `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/sc-coverage-haiku.md` which is created by story 3812-d606. That prompt file must exist before this gate can function.

**File Impact**:
- MODIFY: `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` (add sub-step 2a1 in Preplanning Gate)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] SKILL.md contains SC coverage haiku gate sub-step with named heading
  Verify: grep -q 'SC Coverage Haiku Gate\|SC coverage haiku\|sc_coverage.*haiku\|haiku.*SC coverage' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references sc-coverage-haiku.md prompt file in the sub-step
  Verify: grep -q 'sc-coverage-haiku.md' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains fail-open language (parse failure → skip + warn, proceed to Phase 3)
  Verify: grep -q 'fail-open\|parse failure\|parse.*fail\|fail.*open' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains 0-SC epic handling language
  Verify: grep -q '0-SC\|0 SC\|zero.*SC\|SC.*0\|empty.*SC\|no SC\|SCs.*empty\|epics with 0' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME idempotency for gate
  Verify: grep -A5 -B5 'ORCHESTRATOR_RESUME\|idempotent\|already completed' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q 'sc_coverage\|SC coverage\|haiku gate\|coverage.*gate'
- [ ] RED test from 2b48-99af now passes (GREEN) — test assertions match new SKILL.md content
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-sprint-sc-coverage-haiku-gate.sh
